entry.title: Learning journey via learning hub
entry.content: I have received my free certification attempt CER001 and activated my licence. Now to do a specific certification I need to complete learning journey which is available on learning hub. Do I get access to learning hub after purchasing CER001 or I have to buy it separately?

entry.title: Unable to link p-user with s-user because they both have separate universal ids
entry.content: I am unable to link my personal account (p-user) to my work SAP account (s-user), the problem is I created a universal id for both accounts. I have certification on the p-user account and a learning hub on the s-user one. How can I now link them when they already have separate UIDs? I get an error message when trying telling me that the account is already linked to a UID. I need this as I want to be able to renew my certification through the learning hub.

entry.title: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am a fresher and I want to obtain C_ABAPD certification. 

Question1: C_ABAPD certification is for fresher ? Can a fresher get this certification?
Question2: Is their any certification guide available for C_ABAPD certification from SAP PRESS?
I am not getting any proper guide for the preparation. Please help.

Thank You.

entry.title: Learning Hub erwerben als Privatperson
entry.content:
Guten Tag zusammen,

gerne möchte ich mein bestehendes Wissen als Key User ausbauen und mich im Selbststudium im Bereich SAP zertifizieren.

Da kam ich auf das Learning Hub, welches mir gut gefiel. Leider muss beim Kauf ein Unternehmen angegeben werden.

Kann man als Privatperson das aktuelle Learning Hub nicht erwerben? Wenn nein, haben Sie Empfehlungen wie ich mein Wissen ausbauen kann und eine Zertifizierung anstreben könnte? 

Danke und viele Grüße 

Patrick L.

entry.title: sap certification for disclosure management (DM) and Funding management (FM)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, 

Do you know if disclosure management (DM) and Funding management (FM) are sap certifications ? or if those are embeded en some sap certifiacitions?

Regards, 

Anderson CM.

SAP Disclosure Management SAP Funding Management

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Certification
entry.content: Hi I am trying to attempt the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Certification for the first time. Please guide me how to schedule the exam and prepare better for the test.

entry.title: C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editio
entry.content:
Hello,

I have completed these SAP Learning Journeys that are required for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting:

1. Outlining the Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA

2. Outlining the Record to Report Process in SAP S/4HANA

3. Describing the Receivables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

4. Describing the Payables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

5. Performing Asset Accounting Processes in SAP S/4HANA

6. Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I have completed all of the quiz questions for each learning journey and extensively studied the questions to a point where I can answer all the quiz questions with a 100% score.

I just attempted the sample questions provided on the certification page, and I found that they were extremely difficult and much different than the quiz questions for the required learning journeys.

I would like to ask everyone, if you think that being able to answer all of the quiz questions sucessfully is enough to pass the certification exam?

I would also like to ask everyone, if you can recommend some additional free study materials to better prepare for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting?

Thank you.

entry.title: Hi Team, I am preparing for the SAP FI certification exam. I need links to practice questions
SAP FI certification practice question
entry.content: Hi Team, I am preparing for the SAP FI certification exam. I need links to practice questions

entry.title: SAP Ariba: Contracts why is there no Learning System
entry.content:
Hi,

Part of signing up for a subscription to the learning hub and was clearly advertised that there were practice systems to help with your learning

Unless I am missing something there are no learning systems for SAP Ariba Contracts to help with the certification in this area which is really disappointing

Am I missing something and does anyone know why?

Thank you

entry.title: Scheluding exam problem
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
As a result of the training I received, I have qualified to take the SAP certification exam. However, I cannot schedule my exam. When I click "Schedule your exam" in the system, the system gives me a warning as below that there is no second e-mail in the system. But I already have 2 more e-mails registered in the system. When I refresh the page again, I encounter a system error warning. I would be grateful if you could help me.

entry.title: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Service Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have a question, I want to obtain the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Service Cloud certificate, where can I prepare? What should be studied? Which learning journey should I study? I want to pass, can someone help me please.

Certification

entry.title: Action needed before you can receive your SAP Certification!
entry.content:
Dears,

Currently I am facing a issue I just completed my Fiori exam but I am not able to find my certificated even though I setup my universal ID aleardy and give attemp via same email but still I am not able to fix this issue.

Pictures are attached

entry.title: Query on certification
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Please help me out on this. I am planning to schedule my SAP certification exam in mid October. While scheduling the exam I will be in India but while taking the exam I will be in another country. Will my location allow me to take exam or I need to take the exam in India only.

Kindly help.

Best Regards

entry.title: How long does it take to confirm a payment for certification?
entry.content:
I made a payment via credit card on September 27, 2024, with six attempts, and the amounts were deducted from my account. However, I did not receive any acknowledgment or order number, and the attempts are not reflected in SAP.

I have already created a ticket regarding this issue but have not received a response. What should I do now?

Merchant Name : RATIOCINATE DYNAMICS PRIVATE LIMITED is this the correct Transaction Merchant name Please confirm

entry.title: SAP universal id link to another email. no link button
entry.content: I have problem linking external email to SAP universal id. Email is verified but no link button appears.

entry.title: How can I schedule my exam????!!!
entry.content: I have been trying for weeks to now! I have cer001 . I have not been able to get full help from support . They closed my ticket and sent me to faq but when I click schedule exam it says I have no attempts! This is taking up study time. I’m so frustrated

entry.title: Trying to Pass P_SAPEA_2023 Exam
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

I’m reaching out because I’m trying to get my certification for the P_SAPEA_2023 exam, but I’m feeling really overwhelmed and scared to even give it a shot. I have a few questions and would appreciate any advice or tips you might have!

  • Study Time: If you’ve taken this exam or any similar one, how long did you study for it? I want to set a realistic timeline for my preparation.

  • Background: I don’t have any prior experience with SAP or in this specific field. Do you think going through the official materials and online resources will be enough for me to grasp the concepts?

  • Recommended Resources: Are there any specific resources or study guides that you found particularly helpful for this exam?

  • ERPPrep.com: Has anyone used erpprep.com for study materials? Is it worth it and reliable for the P_SAPEA_2023 exam?

I’m open to any tips or advice you all might have, so please feel free to share anything that could help.

Thank you so much!

entry.title: CER006 exam attempts payment instructions
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

I received booking submission confirmation mail from training.global@sap.com for CER006 order, but its more than 2 days I have not received any further communications regarding payments so I can schedule my exam, Am I missing any process from my side? Can anyone help me out here? 

Regards,

Vijay Chembun

entry.title: Scoring system for SAP Activate Project Manager exam
entry.content:
Hello,

What is the scoring system for SAP Activate Project Manager exam?

For partially correct answers in multiple-choice questions, do we get penalized for incorrect choices?

Example: if there are 3 correct answers for a 5 choices question, and we select only 2 correct and 1 incorrect, is the score 2 out of 5 or otherwise?

 

Thanks in advance!
